title: Analytics - Logout Initiated
scenario: Logout initiated event is not tracked in Firebase Analytics when user logs out of Poly account in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the user is logged into their Poly account (navigate to Account screen if needed).
3. Open the Account screen (Poly Studio Mobile → Account).
4. Tap the 'Log Out' or 'Sign Out' button to log out of the Poly account.
5. Open Firebase Analytics console and navigate to the Events section.
7. Note the current event count for 'logout_initiated' (including breakdowns by country, gender, app version, app build, and app environment).
8. Repeat steps 1–4 to log out again.
9. Return to Firebase Analytics and refresh the 'logout_initiated' event data.
10. Compare the new event count with the previously noted count.
expected: The 'logout_initiated' event count in Firebase Analytics increases by at least 1 after each logout action. Default event parameters (country, gender, app version, app build, app environment) are correctly populated.
